ConnectionStrings.//PegboardDb: PostgreSQL connection. Supplied per-environment on the VPS via the ConnectionStrings__PegboardDb environment variable (kept out of source control). Left blank here on purpose.

Tracking.//ScreenshotImage: Image served by the /media/{trackerId}.png open-beacon (from wwwroot/Images/<file>). Points at the CURRENT WEB club-night board, not the legacy WinForms shot (clubnight-dashboard.png).
